specification.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: OS: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • Processor: Processor: Dual‑core 2.0 GHz (Intel Core i3 / AMD equivalent)
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 11 compatible GPU (Intel HD 4000 / Intel UHD / low-end dedicated GPU)
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 400 MB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectSound / WASAPI compatible audio device (integrated audio or basic 2‑channel sound card); stereo output or headphones required
  • VR Support: no VR Device support
specification.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: OS: Windows 10 / 11 (64-bit)
  • Processor: Quad‑core 2.5 GHz (Intel Core i5 or Ryzen 5)
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 11/12 compatible GPU (e.g., NVIDIA GTX 1050 / AMD RX 560 or Intel Iris Xe)
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 400 MB available space
  • Sound Card: Dedicated or integrated audio device with proper drivers (WASAPI/DirectSound / OpenAL-compatible); stereo or multichannel output supported. Headphones or speakers recommended for best experience.
  • VR Support: no VR Device support

  • VR Support: None
  • Additional Notes: Stable 60 FPS at 1080p in most scenes.
